title: Wolf Variant Eggs
description: Adds spawn eggs for the different Wolf Variants
body:
Adds spawn eggs for all Wolf Variants


1.20.5 added Wolf Variants. Despite this, there was still only one spawn egg.

This mod makes life easier by adding spawn eggs for each variant. All are locatable next to the Wolf Spawn Egg in the Spawn Eggs Creative Tab.

Dependencies:
- [Spawn Egg BYID Redirect](https://modrinth.com/mod/spawn-egg-byid-redirect)
